Off Calendar Nov-25-2014 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-06-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-09-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Plaintiff'S Notice To Appear At Trial
Off Calendar Sep-26-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: The Court adopts the tentative for DEFENDANT MATTHEW SHTAYYEH, MOONSUNG SONG Motion To Quash Plaintiff's Notice To Appear At Trial. The motion is granted and notices to appear are quashed. Request for fees and costs is denied. Leave for late filed opposition is granted. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquist; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
